$comment: IS-FIXTURES ground truth — OUTBOUND sanitizer + assertShareable (release-spec roadmap #4; DD-7(2) abstract-only + DD-7(3) operator-reviewed). The deterministic OUTBOUND tooling (engine/improvement-sharing/sanitize.js: sanitizeForSharing + assertShareable; RD-2 no chain LLM; RD-12 zero-key) MUST reproduce this for each outbound record. The codes/families below were produced by running the LIVE sanitize.js over these fixtures with the deny list from system.improvement-sharing.json -> improvement_sharing.private_terms and brandTerms=['Acme Cosmos']. Two laws: (1) the SANITIZER strips every instance/brand specific reusing engine/shared/redact.js + the inbound privacy-filter primitives + the configured private-term deny list + a no-instance-specifics check (snowflakes / paths / @handles / brand names) — the OUTBOUND mirror of the work-recap privacy gate; (2) assertShareable is a FAIL-CLOSED structural guard that REFUSES (throws UnshareableError, code EUNSHAREABLE) to emit a payload if ANY residual specific survives. The dirty record is refused in onResidual:'refuse' mode and yields a CLEAN payload in 'strip' mode; the clean record passes as-is (sanitizer is a no-op / idempotent). All synthetic Acme Cosmos.
reused_engine: engine/sources/work-recap/privacy-filter.js (inbound structural shapes + private-term matcher — reused outbound)
no-instance-specifics check mirrored from scripts/hygiene-scan.js (snowflake / user-path / @handle / brand-tied-number)
family_mapping_note: The engine COLLAPSES brand name, invented partner, private-term codename, and the fake secret_literal all into the `private_term` family (they are all entries in the private-term deny list; the brand name additionally raises `brand_term`). The $CONTENT_HOME-relative path is detected as the `internal_id` structural shape (not `user-path`, because a $CONTENT_HOME placeholder is hygiene-exempt by design). The placeholder-shaped snowflake raises `snowflake-id`; the @handle raises `handle`.

records.label: (a) DIRTY — carries planted instance/brand specifics
records.why: the rationale + proposed_diff + source_signals.refs carry planted specifics across every class the OUTBOUND guard checks; in onResidual:'refuse' mode the package is fail-closed REFUSED. The fake secret FAKE_TOKEN_do_not_use_0000 is deliberately NOT credential-SHAPED, so engine/shared/redact.js does NOT mask it on its own — it is caught by the deny-list secret_literals (proving the deny list is REQUIRED, mirroring work-recap).

residual_specifics_detected.caught_by: no-instance-specifics check (17-20 digit id) — placeholder shape so hygiene-scan stays clean
inbound privacy-filter structural shape — $CONTENT_HOME placeholder keeps hygiene-scan clean

records.note: In onResidual:'strip' mode the ONLY content that may be emitted is the abstract rule-diff (target kind/path-shape, the opener_repetition_penalty INCREASE direction — never the brand's tuned 0.20->0.40 absolute values are carried as values, only the direction) + a sanitized rationale — never the brand, partner, codename, secret, snowflake, path, or handle. sanitizeForSharing ends by calling assertShareable on its own output, so the returned payload is guaranteed clean (fail-closed even in strip mode). Operator must explicitly confirm the sanitized payload before any package is written (DD-7(3)).

records.label: (b) CLEAN — already abstract
records.why: carries NO instance/brand specifics: no brand name, partner, codename, secret, snowflake, path, handle, or brand-tied performance number. The sanitizer raises ZERO flags (x-sharing.stripped=false, flag_count=0) and assertShareable ACCEPTS. Still requires explicit operator confirmation before the package is written (DD-7(3) — opt-in, fail-closed: disabled/unconfirmed => nothing produced).

consent_and_transmit.$comment: DD-7(1) + (3): opt-in only, off by default, operator-reviewed, NO transmit path. Encodes the cross-cutting laws every outbound run obeys regardless of record.
consent_and_transmit.only_output_sink: local package_output_path (improvement-sharing/outbox) — v1 never pushes, posts, or transmits
